title: Matera CEO Featured in Leaders in Payments Podcast
excerpt: Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, joins Leaders in Payments Podcast for their latest episode to discuss Brazil's financial sector and the revolution cen
body:
Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, joins Leaders in Payments Podcast for their latest episode to discuss Brazil's financial sector and the revolution centered around Pix.

Listen to the podcast on [Leaders in Payments](https://leadersinpayments.com/2024/03/04/carlos-netto-co-founder-ceo-of-matera-episode-303/).
